modmenu.description.better-bats: Overhauls bats with flocking, guano production, and ecological niche behaviors.
gamerule.minecraft.batSwarmSize.descript: Maximum number of bats allowed in a single flock.
gamerule.minecraft.batGuanoThreshold.des: Ticks required for a resting bat to produce guano (Lower is faster).
gamerule.minecraft.batPestControl.descri: If true, bats will hunt silverfish and endermites.
